entry.title: New IDC 89243225DNE000031 awarded to ORANO FEDERAL SERVICES LLC for the amount of $2,000,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 89243225DNE000031 (P00001) awarded to ORANO FEDERAL SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of -$500,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DEOBLIGATE $500,000 FROM CLIN 2 OF THIS LOW-ENRICHED URANIUM (LEU) MASTER IDIQ (ORANO).

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 89243225DNE000031 (P00002) awarded to ORANO FEDERAL SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO:
-CHANGE THE CONTRACT SPECIALIST FROM SETH FRYAR TO DAVID HAWKES.
